overall.description: Gameplay footage from a racing game showing a first-person drive through a colorful Mexican colonial town with cobblestone streets and vibrant building facades. The vehicle navigates gentle curves while passing traditional architecture under an overcast sky, with speedometer and gear indicator visible in the corner confirming the game engine origin.

scene_state.functional_zone: colonial residential street with colorful facades

agents.ego_description: cruising slowly down the cobblestone street observing the colorful colonial architecture

entered.detail: tall green colonial-style apartment building with multiple balconies and stone base
row of connected orange and peach colored colonial buildings with balconies
gray cobblestone paved street with yellow curb lines
overhead electrical wires spanning across the street between poles
bright yellow colonial building with dark trim and balconies

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a drive down a narrow cobblestone street lined with vibrant colonial architecture. A prominent green apartment building dominates the left side while orange and yellow facades line the right, all under an overcast sky with power lines stretching overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: colonial street with mixed colorful architecture

events.description: red car parked on the left side of the street comes into view

agents.ego_description: continuing down the straight road passing various colored buildings and approaching a parked vehicle

entered.detail: vibrant red colonial building with dark window frames and balcony
pink colored colonial building with dark trim and flower boxes
red sedan parked along the left curb

segments.scene_description: Continuing down the cobblestone road, the camera passes a distinctive red building on the right and pink facades on the left. A red parked car appears on the left side as the vehicle progresses down the straight section of the colonial street.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching town square with large institutional building

events.description: vehicle begins turning left at the intersection around the median

agents.ego_description: navigating a left turn at the intersection while slowing down and steering around the central median

entered.detail: large white institutional building with multiple windows and classical architecture at the end of the street
gray stone building with dark windows on the right side
landscaped median strip with purple flowers and a yellow traffic sign

segments.scene_description: The vehicle approaches a curve revealing a large white institutional building ahead. After passing the parked red car, the camera turns left at the intersection where a landscaped median with flowers and a traffic sign becomes visible in the center of the road.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive through a narrow colonial street that gradually opens into a wider intersection. It begins by navigating a cobblestone road lined with vibrant green, orange, and yellow facades under an overcast sky with power lines stretching overhead. As the vehicle progresses, the scenery shifts to pass a distinctive red building on the right and pink facades on the left, gliding past a red car parked along the curb. The scene then expands as the road curves toward a large white institutional building, before finally turning left at an intersection marked by a landscaped median with colorful flowers and a traffic sign.
